author: f1troll

caption:
In the first INDYCAR race after Dan Wheldon’s death, they named a straightaway after him.

When Helio Castroneves won that 2012 race, he ran to the fence to honor one of the greatest to ever do it.

Nine years later, Helio stood on the Yard of Bricks at the Indianapolis 500 after his record-tying fourth win… talking with Dan’s two sons.

Now Sebastian and Oliver are racers themselves.

Legacy isn’t just remembered.
It keeps racing forward.

caption:
More than 120 girls from Jeddah were welcomed to the 2026 Jeddah E-Prix for exclusive behind-the-scenes paddock access, offering a rare insight into elite electric racing and careers in motorsport.

With 22% of national karting talent under 16 and 18% female, national development pathways such as Muhra by samf_gov alongside initiatives like FIA Girls on Track, are helping bring the next generation closer to the sport.

author: f1

caption:
Melbourne’s Albert Park has renamed Turn 6 to “In Her Corner” for the 2026 Australian Grand Prix 🇦🇺

The corner will honour Laura Mueller, the first female race engineer in Formula 1 history, and Hannah Schmitz, Red Bull’s Principal Strategy Engineer who has played a huge role in Max Verstappen’s success.

The tribute is part of the “In Her Corner” initiative and will take place during the Australian Grand Prix weekend, which falls on International Women’s Day (March 8).

It’s a way to celebrate women in Formula 1 and inspire more girls to pursue careers in engineering and STEM. 💙

#f1 #formula1 #redbullracing #australiangp #haasf1

caption:
The Indian government has begun working on plans to bring Formula 1 back to the country. Officials recently visited the Buddh International Circuit in Greater Noida, signaling strong interest in reviving the Indian Grand Prix.

The race was last held in 2013 but was dropped due to tax and regulatory issues. Now, with renewed government support, talks are underway to make India a part of the Formula 1 calendar once again.

If successful, this would mark a major comeback for motorsport in India after more than a decade, giving fans hope of seeing the world’s fastest cars on Indian soil once more.
.
.

caption:
Lewis Hamilton and Kim Kardashian are making headlines after being spotted together in Oxfordshire over the weekend. Their private getaway quickly sparked rumors of a possible romance.

Just days later, the two were seen arriving at a Paris hotel, adding fuel to the speculation. While neither has confirmed the relationship, fans and media outlets are calling this one of the most surprising pairings of 2026.
.
.
